description:
Your restaurant is launching an exclusive Chef's Table dining experience. Configure the POS system completely and validate with a test order.

In the Back Office (PIN: 1111): Create a CHEFS TABLE floor section with two tables — C1 (capacity 4) and C2 (capacity 6). Create a PREMIUM TAX at 10%. Create a CHEFS TABLE MENU category. Add a menu item Wagyu Tasting at $85.00 to this category, assigned to PREMIUM TAX.

Set up inventory tracking: create an inventory item Wagyu Beef A5 with initial stock of 20 units. Configure the Wagyu Tasting recipe to consume 1 unit of Wagyu Beef A5 per order.

Create a Preparation modifier group with three options: Rare ($0.00), Medium ($0.00), and Well Done ($5.00). Link this modifier group to Wagyu Tasting requiring exactly one selection (minimum 1, maximum 1).

Validate the setup: process a DINE IN order at Table C1 on the CHEFS TABLE floor — add Wagyu Tasting with the Medium preparation, and settle with CASH.
